description: KSI-aligned capability themes for grouping SCF controls into assessable capabilities. Inspired by FedRAMP 20x Key Security Indicators (RFC-0006).

themes.name: Authorization & Compliance Posture
themes.description: Encompasses security assessment, authorization processes, and overall compliance posture management. Covers continuous authorization, security planning, and compliance monitoring activities.

themes.name: Change Management
themes.description: Covers configuration management, change control processes, version management, and deployment practices. Ensures changes to information systems are formally identified, controlled, and tracked.

themes.name: Cloud Native Architecture
themes.description: Addresses cloud-native design principles, system and communications protection, high availability, network architecture, and resilient infrastructure patterns.

themes.name: Cybersecurity Education
themes.description: Covers security awareness training, role-specific cybersecurity education, phishing awareness, and workforce security competency development.

themes.name: Identity & Access Management
themes.description: Encompasses authentication, authorization, least privilege enforcement, multi-factor authentication, access control policies, and identity lifecycle management.

themes.name: Incident Response
themes.description: Covers incident detection, analysis, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident activities. Includes incident response planning, testing, and coordination.

themes.name: Monitoring, Logging & Auditing
themes.description: Addresses audit record generation, log management, SIEM integration, continuous monitoring, information system monitoring, and security event correlation.

themes.name: Policy & Inventory
themes.description: Encompasses security policy management, asset inventory, risk assessment, system development lifecycle, program management, personnel security, and privacy controls.

themes.name: Recovery Planning
themes.description: Covers business continuity planning, backup and restoration procedures, disaster recovery, contingency plan testing, and recovery time/point objectives.

themes.name: Service Configuration
themes.description: Addresses system hardening, encryption standards, patch management, maintenance procedures, media protection, and physical/environmental protection of information systems.

themes.name: Supply Chain Risk
themes.description: Covers third-party risk management, software bill of materials (SBOM), supply chain risk assessment, zero trust principles for external dependencies, and vendor security evaluation.

nist_family_mappings._description: Maps NIST 800-53 R5 control families to capability themes. Used to compute SCF-to-theme mappings via the existing NIST 800-53 crosswalk in control_guidance.json.
